message:
fix(freeze): implement to_propkey2 and fix dup1 stack semantics

- Fix dup1 opcode: was [a,b]->[a,b,a], now correctly [a,b]->[a,a,b]
  The duplicate should be inserted in the middle, not pushed to top
- Implement to_propkey2 for computed property destructuring
  Stack [obj,key]->[obj,propkey] with null/undefined check
- Change to_propkey2 category from never_freeze to complex
- Add --strict flag to freeze CLI for CI error mode
- Add EDGEBOX_FREEZE_STRICT env var for build-time strict mode
- In strict mode, build fails on unsupported opcodes (exit 1)

Computed property destructuring now works in all contexts:
  const { [key]: value } = obj;  // Previously returned undefined
